calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioners Chung Hay Woo and Hui Ting Xiong; father and mother of minor present in court.
Petitioners sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Suyin Huang.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor 1. from Shu Yin Hu to Tracy Shu Yin Woo. Minor 2. Sandy Woo to Sandy Yoyo Woo. The court also grants the petition for Name Change of (mother) Hui Ting Xiong to Hui Tin Tina Xiong.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
